supportingStatement: Helping you discover it, build it, and share it with the world.

surfaces.objective: Lead with the core promise before products, services, or platform features.
surfaces.supportingMessage: Helping you discover it, build it, and share it with the world.

surfaces.objective: Present Kairos as the steady guide and operating system for preserving context and recommending next actions.
surfaces.supportingMessage: Treat user work as a connected body of work rather than isolated content.

surfaces.objective: Capture customer knowledge, skills, goals, interests, and desired income paths without hype or shortcut language.
surfaces.requiredMessage: Start with what you already know.
surfaces.supportingMessage: Kairos helps organize it into projects, assets, and next actions.

surfaces.objective: Position the library as practical education that helps users build capability and durable assets.
surfaces.requiredMessage: Learn, create, grow, and preserve what you build.
surfaces.supportingMessage: Every resource should move the user closer to useful execution.

surfaces.objective: Frame books and digital products as tools inside the larger value-building system.
surfaces.requiredMessage: This product helps package knowledge into practical action.
surfaces.supportingMessage: Avoid presenting products as isolated one-off purchases.

surfaces.objective: Present services as guided execution support for people building around their unique value.
surfaces.requiredMessage: Guided support for turning your knowledge into assets.
surfaces.supportingMessage: Preserve integrity, clarity, and long-term value over hype.
